---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<section style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem;">
  <div class="section-label">Who I am</div>
  <h1>About Me</h1>
  <hr class="neon-rule">
</section>
```

```{=html}
<div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1.6fr; gap: 4rem; align-items: start; padding-bottom: 4rem;">
  <div>
    <img
      src="images/profile.png"
      alt="Raunit Budhiraja"
      style="width:100%; border-radius:16px; border:1px solid #252535; filter: grayscale(20%);"
    />
    <div style="margin-top: 1.5rem; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:0.6rem;">
      <a href="mailto:raunit.budhiraja@mail.dcu.ie" class="btn-ghost" style="justify-content:center;">
        ✉ raunit.budhiraja@mail.dcu.ie
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/raunit-budhiraja-980595203/" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost" style="justify-content:center;">
        LinkedIn →
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/raunitbudhiraja02" target="_blank" class="btn-ghost" style="justify-content:center;">
        GitHub →
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div>
    <p style="font-size:1.1rem; color:#e2e2e2; line-height:1.9;">
      Hi, I’m Raunit, a Business Analytics student at Dublin City University focused on turning data into clear, decision-ready insights. I work at the intersection of analytics and business strategy.
       I grew up comfortable with numbers but
      fell in love with code once I realised how much you could do with a 40-line Python script
      and a decent dataset.
    </p>

    <p style="margin-top:1.2rem;">
      My academic work sits across data analysis, machine learning, and business strategy.
      Outside of lectures, I spend time building small projects; usually starting from a question
      I genuinely want to answer, then figuring out the tools from there.
    </p>

    <p>
      I'm particularly drawn to projects where the output is something a non-technical stakeholder
      can actually use; a clean dashboard, a single-number forecast, or a well-told data story.
      That intersection of rigour and communication is where I want to keep getting better.
    </p>

    <div style="margin-top: 2.5rem;">
      <div class="section-label">Education</div>
      <div class="timeline" style="margin-top:1.2rem;">
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="tl-date">2025 – Present</div>
          <h3>MSc Business Analytics</h3>
          <p>Dublin City University (DCU)</p>
        </div>
        <div class="timeline-item">
          <div class="tl-date">2020-2023</div>
          <h3> BCA,Bachelor's Degree Certificate</h3>
          <p>Amity University, India</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

```{=html}
<section style="padding: 3rem 0 5rem;">
  <div class="section-label">Compliance Training</div>
  <h2 style="margin-bottom:1.5rem;">Kubicle Certifications</h2>
  <p>As part of the BAA1104 module, I completed the following Kubicle courses covering data governance and ethics:</p>

  <div class="card-grid" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
    <div class="project-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="card-tag">✓ Completed</div>
      <h3>Introduction to GDPR</h3>
      <p>Principles of data protection, lawful processing, and individual rights under EU law.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="card-tag">✓ Completed</div>
      <h3>Data Security: Keeping Your Information Safe</h3>
      <p>Introduction to information security concepts, threats, and mitigation strategies.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="card-tag">✓ Completed</div>
      <h3>Data Security: Handling Data Securely</h3>
      <p>Security protocols, responsible handling of sensitive data, and organisational practices.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="card-tag">✓ Completed</div>
      <h3>Data Ethics & Risk: Introduction</h3>
      <p>Ethical dimensions of data collection, bias, fairness, and algorithmic accountability.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="project-card" style="cursor:default;">
      <div class="card-tag">✓ Completed</div>
      <h3>Data Ethics & Risk: Applying Ethical Thinking</h3>
      <p>Practical frameworks for responsible data use in real business and research contexts.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```
